title: mutisia friesiana
intro: Mutisia friesiana, also known as the Fries' Mutisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Mutisia friesiana include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant effects, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Mutisia friesiana is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
